exam_price_notes: Level II registration ~$995. Must pass Level I first.

testing_centers.notes: Computer-based testing at Pearson VUE centers globally. Online proctoring available.

id_requirements: One valid, unexpired government-issued photo ID. Name must match CAIA registration exactly.
exam_rules: Closed-book for MCQ. On-screen calculator provided. No notes or reference materials. Proctor monitors throughout. Exams offered in March and September windows.
renewal_options: Annual CAIA Association membership dues required to maintain charter. Members also encouraged to complete continuing education through CAIA's digital badges and CPD program.

prerequisites.description: Must pass CAIA Level I before registering for Level II
1 year of professional experience in alternative investments OR undergraduate degree in a related field

retake_policy.notes: Exams offered twice per year (March and September). No limit on total attempts. Full retake fee required.

domains.name: Manager Selection, Due Diligence, and Regulation

official_study_resources.title: CAIA Curriculum (Wiley)
official_study_resources.notes: Official curriculum published by Wiley; included with exam registration
